He is a Sakuragaoka High School student in Class 1-4 during the secondary cast's second high school year. name: Alone

He is the purest soul on earth and believes that everybody has a good side and disapproves the use of violence, which is why Hades chose to reincarnate in his body. name: Benio Yonomori
description: Benio Yonomori is Kobeni's elder sister who has two personas: an immature and a carefree loving sister at home and the student council president at school, where she maintains her respectable popular image as a demure, well-mannered and an elegant top-performing student in front of her legion of fans. She has taken a liking to Mashiro to the extent that she would do all sorts of advances to her at home.

name: Inkarmat
description: __Likes:__ Rabbit meat __Dislikes:__ Dogs Inkarmat is a mysterious Ainu fortune-teller who meets Asirpa during her travels. Inkarmat is a sly and cunning woman, oftentimes using people's perceptions against them and using quick deduction and the knowledge that she holds to make her 'predictions'. name: Joe
description: Mitsuki's uncle. He doesn't have children of his own, so he's all-in on loving his niece. The ultimate doting uncle. He's always pursued what he loves, so he wants Mitsuki to be true to herself as well. When he was young, he worked hard to make a living from music, but now he's the owner of a run-down CD shop.

name: Jun-U Choi
description: Appearing at the start of the series as a timid, gloomy and lonely guy, Jun-U thinks of himself as an 'outsider' and rarely ever felt that he fit in with the others at school. During the progression of the series, he is described as a selfless person, as he always goes out of his way to help the ones dearest to him.

name: Kaito Onogi
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5’10") Kaito Onogi is a first-year student at Kazemai High School and a member of the kyudo club. Kaito comes off as short-tempered, overly serious, and aggressive. He is easily riled up, especially when his cousin [Nanao](https://anilist.co/character/128275/) calls him Kacchan or when he perceives someone to not be taking something as seriously as he does. name: Kei Sakurai
description: The descendant of a bloodline that allied with the Obsidian Round Table during World War II. She joined the Table to fill the spot left by a member who died eleven years prior. Furthermore, as her age - contrary to the other members - does actually match her appearance, she is too young to have met the five highest-ranking members of the Table. (Source: VNDB)

name: Konoha Koga
description: Despite looking like a normal high school girl, she is an assassin. She invites [Satoko](https://anilist.co/character/341512/Satoko-Kusagakure) to help with her assassin work due to the usefulness of her ninjutsu. Outside of work she is somewhat of a slob and her real name is unknown.

name: Mako Akagi
description: She is Akagi Gaju's younger sister as well as his dance partner. They have been dancing together since she was four years old, with her being the one who initiated the pair's entry into the dance world. She thinks herself as somewhat unworthy of her brother's partnership.

name: Makoto Itou
description: **Height:** 167.5cm (5’6”) Makoto Ito is the protagonist of the series. A generally mannered and composed student in year one of class three, his life becomes complicated when he begins to unfaithfully initiate numerous relationships with girls that he is unable to singly commit to. name: Melfina
description: The Goddess of Reincarnation, she is the one responsible for giving Kelvin his powers in exchange for his memories. As she is a godess, she has a very high level, over 100. She is so strong that Kevin himself, an S-rank summoner, couldn't summon her when he entered the world.
